overview: I built a full AI eval pipeline: SQLite storage, token instrumentation across 6 SAFe agents, a 6-case golden set, a 5-tab Streamlit dashboard, and a Claude Sonnet improvement suggester. Key find: LLM-as-judge variance is ±7pts even at temp 0.0.

keyPoints.title: LLM judge scores vary ±7pts even at temperature 0.0
Bare→boosted PM input drives +13 to +25 score gains
Router v2 fixed intermittent EXPERIENCE misclassification with A/B data
Improvement Suggester proposes edits; I decide whether to apply
